title: Vanilla Dungeons Experience
description: A Vanilla Experience featuring more weapons , dungeons , mobs and posibilities for 1.20.1 !
body:
# Vanilla Dungeons Experience ! 

**What is The Vanilla Dungeons Experience Modpack ?**

- This modpack features over 150 Mods ! 
- It's aimed at giving the player a vanilla experience with more strucutres and loot to explore while not breaking the limits of the Minecraft feel ! 
- There's plenty of mods aimed at making the life of the player easier,like automated crop farming and ores ! 

**Make sure to check all the mods included in the mod pack and check all the mods creators page :) They all did an amazing jobs on these amazing beautiful mods ! I take absolutely no credit for any of these !**

**What this modpack features but not limited to :**

- For World Generation I used Geophilic for subtle vanilla plus experience and Incendium for the nether paired with the amazing NullScape for the End !
- This modpack contains 7 different shaderpacks for your desires ! (highly suggests Complementary Unbound with my custom settings)
- This modpack features two dungeon generation mods, The epic "When Dungeons Arise" and the "Dungeons and Taverns" mod. 
- This modpack features many combat and enhancement mods like Better Combat, Simply Swords, All the RPG Series mods including the Gazebos ! 
- There's a ton of QoL mods including but not limited to : Magic Mirror from terraria , TerraStorage for better chest features, Botany Pots including the Botany Trees and Ores add-ons, Craftable GunPowder and NameTags and even Gliders for early adventuring, Tree harvester, Vein Mining enchantements and more ! 
- Tons of furniture for you to decorate your houses, dungeons and villages ! Like Macaw's Hoidays, Macaw's paths and pavings, Lights and Lamps and Macaw's Windows. There's also Hearth & Home and Handcrafted and even Dusty Decorations ! 
- For food I featured the classic Farmer's Delight Refabricated ! 
- Mobs ? Theres the firends and foes mod and Naturalist ! 
- Tools and armor ? Yes ! There's the Hammers and Excavator mod and the immersive armor mod ! Also everything from the RPG Series .


**Optional Settings :**
- In Structurify I highly suggest changing the following Structure Spread Settings : 
**Global Settings**
- Enable Global Spacing and Separation : Yes 
- Global Spacing and Separation modifier : 0.70
**Dungeons Arise structures Minor Structures :**
- Override Global Settings : Yes
- Spacing : 74
- Separation : 50 

These settings will Guarantee that structures spawn a little closer but not too much , personally i enjoy having my structures a bit more close but again, this is all optional ! If you want more spreaded out structures don't change any settings in Structurify or even increase them over 1.00 ! 

**In the main menu to use the FancyMenu mod you can do CTRL + ALT + C !** 
- Why ? You ask, well because the 3rd person camera option for the gliders mod is overlapping other option so with this beautiful mod you go fix the GUI and place the option under the others ! 

**RAM Allocation :**
- I Suggest anything between 4-8 Gb of RAM for running this modpack ! If you intend on using the structurify settings and shaders i suggest 6-8 GB !
